---
title: "Project Map"
description: "An interactive dependency map of the BEDC project: each node is a namecert region, each edge a dependency, sized by theorem count, colored by status. Click any node for the bilingual term entry. EN / 中文 toggle at top right."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/cytoscape@3.30.2/dist/cytoscape.min.css">
---

```{=html}
<style>
  body { background: #fbfbfa; }
  main.content { padding-top: 1rem !important; padding-bottom: 0 !important; max-width: 100% !important; }
  #title-block-header { display: none; }

  .map-shell {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 200px;
    grid-template-rows: auto minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
    grid-template-areas: "header header" "graph detail" "footer footer";
    height: calc(100vh - 60px);
    min-height: 760px;
    gap: 0;
    background: #fbfbfa;
    border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
  }
  main.content > .quarto-section-identifier { display: none; }
  .quarto-container { max-width: 100% !important; padding: 0 !important; }
  @media (max-width: 900px) {
    .map-shell { grid-template-columns: 1fr; grid-template-areas: "header" "graph" "detail" "footer"; height: auto; }
    #cy { height: 540px; }
    #detail { max-height: 480px; overflow-y: auto; }
  }

  .map-header {
    grid-area: header;
    padding: 0.7rem 1.2rem;
    display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0; background: #fff;
  }
  .map-header h1 { margin: 0; font-size: 1.15rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }
  .map-header .summary { font-size: 0.86rem; color: #666; }
  .map-header .summary strong { color: #222; }
  .lang-toggle { font-size: 0.85rem; }
  .lang-toggle button {
    border: 1px solid #ccc; background: white; padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem;
    cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.85rem;
  }
  .lang-toggle button.active { background: #222; color: white; border-color: #222; }
  .region-picker {
    font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.88rem;
    padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; border: 1px solid #bbb; border-radius: 3px;
    background: white; min-width: 220px; cursor: pointer;
  }
  .region-picker:focus { outline: 2px solid #2c3e50; outline-offset: -1px; }

  #cy { grid-area: graph; height: 100%; background: #fbfbfa; }

  #detail {
    grid-area: detail; padding: 1.2rem; overflow-y: auto;
    border-left: 1px solid #e0e0e0; background: #fff; font-size: 0.92rem;
  }
  #detail .hint { color: #aaa; font-style: italic; }
  #detail .term-name { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; }
  #detail .term-other { color: #888; font-size: 0.95rem; margin-left: 0.4rem; font-style: italic; }
  #detail .term-desc { margin-top: 0.5rem; line-height: 1.55; }
  #detail .term-other-desc { margin-top: 0.4rem; color: #777; line-height: 1.5; font-style: italic; }
  #detail .term-stats {
    margin-top: 0.9rem; padding-top: 0.7rem; border-top: 1px dashed #ddd;
    font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.84rem;
  }
  #detail .term-stats span { display: inline-block; margin-right: 0.6rem; padding: 0.1rem 0.45rem; background: #f4f4f4; border-radius: 3px; }
  #detail .term-deps { margin-top: 0.7rem; font-size: 0.86rem; color: #555; }
  #detail .term-deps a { color: #2c3e50; cursor: pointer; text-decoration: underline dotted; margin-right: 0.4rem; }
  #detail .term-deps a:hover { color: #c0392b; }
  #detail .legend { margin-top: 1.5rem; padding-top: 0.9rem; border-top: 1px solid #eee; font-size: 0.82rem; color: #666; }
  #detail .legend .swatch { display: inline-block; width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 50%; vertical-align: middle; margin-right: 0.3rem; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.2); }
  #detail .crit-list { margin-top: 0.7rem; }
  #detail .crit-list a {
    display: block; padding: 0.25rem 0.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
    background: #fef5f3; border-left: 3px solid #c0392b; cursor: pointer;
    text-decoration: none; color: #222; font-size: 0.86rem;
  }
  #detail .crit-list a:hover { background: #fdebe7; }
  #detail .crit-list .crit-meta { color: #888; font-size: 0.78rem; margin-left: 0.4rem; }
  #detail .glossary-toggle {
    margin-top: 1rem; padding: 0.4rem 0.7rem; width: 100%;
    border: 1px solid #ccc; background: white; border-radius: 4px;
    cursor: pointer; font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.85rem;
    text-align: left;
  }
  #detail .glossary-toggle:hover { background: #f4f4f4; }
  #detail .glossary-toggle.active { background: #2c3e50; color: white; border-color: #2c3e50; }
  #glossary-pane {
    position: fixed; top: 0; right: 0; width: 420px; height: 100vh;
    background: white; border-left: 1px solid #ccc;
    box-shadow: -4px 0 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
    overflow-y: auto; z-index: 1000;
    transform: translateX(100%); transition: transform 0.2s ease;
  }
  #glossary-pane.open { transform: translateX(0); }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-header {
    position: sticky; top: 0; padding: 0.8rem 1.2rem;
    background: #fff; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem;
  }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-header button {
    border: none; background: transparent; font-size: 1.4rem;
    cursor: pointer; color: #666;
  }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-body { padding: 0.8rem 1.2rem; }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-section {
    margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
  }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-section h3 {
    font-size: 0.78rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.06em;
    color: #888; margin: 0 0 0.4rem 0; font-weight: 600;
  }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-entry {
    padding: 0.4rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #f4f4f4;
  }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-entry:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-entry .term {
    font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.95rem;
  }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-entry .term-zh {
    color: #888; font-style: italic; margin-left: 0.4rem; font-size: 0.88rem;
  }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-entry .desc {
    margin-top: 0.25rem; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.45; color: #444;
  }
  #glossary-pane .glossary-entry .desc-zh {
    margin-top: 0.2rem; font-size: 0.8rem; line-height: 1.45; color: #888;
    font-style: italic;
  }

  .map-footer {
    grid-area: footer; padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem;
    border-top: 1px solid #e0e0e0; background: #fff;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 1rem; font-size: 0.83rem; color: #666;
  }
  #spark { flex: 1; height: 28px; }
  .map-footer .meta { white-space: nowrap; }
</style>

<div class="map-shell">
  <div class="map-header">
    <h1 data-i18n="title">BEDC Project Map</h1>
    <div class="summary" id="summary"></div>
    <select id="region-picker" class="region-picker" onchange="onPickerChange(this.value)">
      <option value="" data-i18n="picker_default">-- jump to region --</option>
    </select>
    <div class="lang-toggle">
      <span data-i18n="lang_label" style="margin-right:0.4rem;">Language:</span>
      <button id="btn-en" class="active" onclick="setLang('en')">EN</button>
      <button id="btn-zh" onclick="setLang('zh')">中文</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div id="cy"></div>

  <div id="detail">
    <div id="detail-content">
      <div class="hint" data-i18n="hint">Click a node to see its bilingual entry, stats, and dependencies.</div>
    </div>

    <div class="legend">
      <div data-i18n="legend_title" style="font-weight:600; color:#444; margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Legend</div>
      <div><span class="swatch" style="background:#c0392b;"></span><span data-i18n="legend_crit">Frontline (AI's current target)</span></div>
      <div><span class="swatch" style="background:#27ae60;"></span><span data-i18n="legend_proven">Proven (all markers checked)</span></div>
      <div><span class="swatch" style="background:#3498db;"></span><span data-i18n="legend_prog">In progress (partly checked)</span></div>
      <div><span class="swatch" style="background:#bdc3c7;"></span><span data-i18n="legend_scaf">Scaffold (paper only, Lean pending)</span></div>
      <div><span class="swatch" style="background:#8e44ad;"></span><span data-i18n="legend_schema">Schema-only horizon (intentional)</span></div>
      <div style="margin-top:0.4rem; color:#888;" data-i18n="legend_size">Size = total paper obligations (checked + stated).</div>
    </div>

    <div class="legend">
      <div data-i18n="crit_title" style="font-weight:600; color:#444; margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Where AI is attacking now</div>
      <div id="crit-list" class="crit-list"></div>
    </div>

    <button class="glossary-toggle" onclick="toggleGlossary()">
      <span data-i18n="glossary_btn">📖 Browse all bilingual terms</span>
    </button>
  </div>

  <div id="glossary-pane">
    <div class="glossary-header">
      <span data-i18n="glossary_title">Bilingual Glossary</span>
      <button onclick="toggleGlossary()">×</button>
    </div>
    <div class="glossary-body" id="glossary-body"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="map-footer">
    <span class="meta"><span data-i18n="footer_activity">Monthly commits</span></span>
    <svg id="spark" preserveAspectRatio="none"></svg>
    <span class="meta" id="footer-range"></span>
  </div>
</div>

<script src="https://unpkg.com/cytoscape@3.30.2/dist/cytoscape.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/dagre@0.8.5/dist/dagre.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/cytoscape-dagre@2.5.0/cytoscape-dagre.js"></script>

<script>
const I18N = {
  en: {
    title: "BEDC Project Map",
    lang_label: "Language:",
    hint: "Click a node to see its bilingual entry, stats, and dependencies.",
    legend_title: "Legend",
    legend_crit: "Frontline (AI's current target)",
    legend_proven: "Proven (all markers checked)",
    legend_prog: "In progress (partly checked)",
    legend_scaf: "Scaffold (paper only, Lean pending)",
    legend_schema: "Schema-only horizon (intentional)",
    legend_size: "Size = total paper obligations (checked + stated).",
    crit_title: "Where AI is attacking now",
    footer_activity: "Monthly commits",
    sum_theorems: "theorems",
    sum_regions: "regions",
    sum_edges: "edges",
    detail_thms: "Lean theorems",
    detail_checked: "checked",
    detail_stmt: "stated",
    detail_files: "files",
    detail_score: "score",
    detail_downstream: "downstream",
    detail_deps: "Depends on:",
    picker_default: "-- jump to region --",
    grp_kernel: "Kernel primitives",
    grp_namecert: "NameCert framework",
    grp_methodology: "Methodology",
    grp_discrete: "Discrete primitives",
    grp_number: "Number systems",
    grp_algebra: "Algebra",
    grp_order: "Order / lattice",
    grp_topology: "Topology",
    grp_categorical: "Categorical",
    grp_analysis: "Complex analysis",
    grp_zeta: "Dirichlet / Zeta",
    grp_reflection: "Reflection / capstone",
    grp_roadmap: "Roadmap (future Up types)",
    grp_other: "Other",
    glossary_btn: "📖 Browse all bilingual terms",
    glossary_title: "Bilingual Glossary",
  },
  zh: {
    title: "BEDC 项目地图",
    lang_label: "语言:",
    hint: "点击节点查看双语词条, 统计和依赖关系.",
    legend_title: "图例",
    legend_crit: "前线 (AI 当前攻坚)",
    legend_proven: "已证 (所有 marker 都已 checked)",
    legend_prog: "进行中 (部分 checked)",
    legend_scaf: "脚架 (仅论文, Lean 待补)",
    legend_schema: "Schema-only 视界 (有意为之)",
    legend_size: "节点大小 = 论文 obligation 总数 (checked + stated).",
    crit_title: "AI 当前攻坚位置",
    footer_activity: "每月提交数",
    sum_theorems: "定理",
    sum_regions: "领域",
    sum_edges: "依赖边",
    detail_thms: "Lean 定理",
    detail_checked: "已证",
    detail_stmt: "陈述",
    detail_files: "文件",
    detail_score: "得分",
    detail_downstream: "下游影响",
    detail_deps: "依赖于:",
    picker_default: "-- 跳到领域 --",
    grp_kernel: "内核原语",
    grp_namecert: "NameCert 框架",
    grp_methodology: "方法论",
    grp_discrete: "离散原语",
    grp_number: "数系",
    grp_algebra: "代数",
    grp_order: "序 / 格",
    grp_topology: "拓扑",
    grp_categorical: "范畴",
    grp_analysis: "复分析",
    grp_zeta: "Dirichlet / ζ",
    grp_reflection: "反思 / capstone",
    grp_roadmap: "路线图 (未来 Up 类型)",
    grp_other: "其他",
    glossary_btn: "📖 浏览全部双语术语",
    glossary_title: "双语术语表",
  },
};

let LANG = "en";
let STATUS = null, GLOSSARY = null, DEPS = null, CY = null;
let CRIT_SET = new Set();

async function loadData() {
  const v = "?v=" + Date.now();
  const [s, g, d] = await Promise.all([
    fetch("data/status.json" + v, { cache: "no-store" }).then(r => r.json()),
    fetch("data/glossary.json" + v, { cache: "no-store" }).then(r => r.json()),
    fetch("data/dependency.json" + v, { cache: "no-store" }).then(r => r.json()),
  ]);
  STATUS = s; GLOSSARY = g; DEPS = d;
  CRIT_SET = new Set((STATUS.critical_path || []).map(c => c.name));
}

function t(key) { return I18N[LANG][key] || key; }

function applyStaticI18n() {
  document.querySelectorAll("[data-i18n]").forEach(el => {
    const key = el.getAttribute("data-i18n");
    if (I18N[LANG][key] !== undefined) el.innerHTML = I18N[LANG][key];
  });
  document.getElementById("btn-en").classList.toggle("active", LANG === "en");
  document.getElementById("btn-zh").classList.toggle("active", LANG === "zh");
  document.getElementById("summary").innerHTML =
    `<strong>${STATUS.total_theorems}</strong> ${t("sum_theorems")} · ` +
    `<strong>${DEPS.nodes.length}</strong> ${t("sum_regions")} · ` +
    `<strong>${DEPS.edges.length}</strong> ${t("sum_edges")}`;
  populatePicker();
}

// Group regions into mathematical areas for the dropdown picker.
const REGION_GROUPS = [
  ["grp_kernel",       ["kernel"]],
  ["grp_discrete",     ["bool", "option", "prod", "sum", "list"]],
  ["grp_number",       ["nat", "add", "int", "rat", "real", "complex", "prime"]],
  ["grp_algebra",      ["monoid", "group", "abgroup", "ring", "commring", "field",
                        "module", "vecspace", "linearmap", "matrix", "polynomial", "fps"]],
  ["grp_order",        ["preorder", "poset", "totalorder", "lattice", "interval"]],
  ["grp_topology",     ["metric", "compact", "continuous", "s1"]],
  ["grp_categorical",  ["category", "functor", "nattrans"]],
  ["grp_analysis",     ["complexlimit", "convergenceradius", "complexdiff",
                        "holomorphic", "complexseries", "contour", "anacont"]],
  ["grp_zeta",         ["dirichletseries", "zetabasic", "zetacont", "critstrip", "zetazeros"]],
  ["grp_reflection",   ["observer", "interhist"]],
];

function pickerOptionLabel(node) {
  const g = GLOSSARY[node.id];
  const en = g ? g.en.label : node.id;
  const zh = g ? g.zh.label : "";
  return LANG === "zh"
    ? `${zh}${en !== zh ? "  ·  " + en : ""}`
    : `${en}${zh && zh !== en ? "  ·  " + zh : ""}`;
}

function populatePicker() {
  const sel = document.getElementById("region-picker");
  if (!sel) return;
  const idsInGraph = new Set(DEPS.nodes.map(n => n.id));
  const placed = new Set();

  // build option groups from REGION_GROUPS, then a final "Other" group for stragglers
  const groups = REGION_GROUPS.map(([key, ids]) => ({
    key,
    items: ids.filter(id => idsInGraph.has(id)),
  })).filter(g => g.items.length > 0);
  groups.forEach(g => g.items.forEach(id => placed.add(id)));
  const leftover = DEPS.nodes
    .filter(n => !placed.has(n.id))
    .map(n => n.id)
    .sort();
  if (leftover.length) groups.push({ key: "grp_other", items: leftover });

  let html = `<option value="">${t("picker_default")}</option>`;
  for (const g of groups) {
    html += `<optgroup label="${t(g.key)}">`;
    for (const id of g.items) {
      const node = DEPS.nodes.find(n => n.id === id);
      if (!node) continue;
      html += `<option value="${id}">${pickerOptionLabel(node)}</option>`;
    }
    html += `</optgroup>`;
  }
  sel.innerHTML = html;
}

function onPickerChange(id) {
  if (!id) return;
  showNodeDetail(id);
  // Highlight the picked node + its dependency chain in the existing global
  // view; do NOT change zoom. The graph stays at its fit-to-screen scale so
  // the user keeps the full map context.
}

// --- Glossary side pane ----------------------------------------------------
// Group ordering for the side pane. Each entry: [i18n_key, [glossary keys]].
// Glossary keys not listed here fall into 'grp_other'.
const GLOSSARY_GROUPS = [
  ["grp_kernel",      ["BHist", "Hist", "Cont", "hsame", "psame", "msame", "E0", "E1", "kernel"]],
  ["grp_namecert",    ["NameCert", "SourceSpec", "PatternSpec", "ClassifierSpec", "StabilityCert", "LedgerPolicy"]],
  ["grp_methodology", ["axiom-purity", "schema-only"]],
  ["grp_discrete",    ["bool", "option", "prod", "sum", "list"]],
  ["grp_number",      ["nat", "add", "int", "rat", "real", "complex", "prime"]],
  ["grp_algebra",     ["monoid", "group", "abgroup", "ring", "commring", "field",
                       "module", "vecspace", "linearmap", "matrix", "polynomial", "fps"]],
  ["grp_order",       ["preorder", "poset", "totalorder", "lattice", "interval"]],
  ["grp_topology",    ["metric", "compact", "continuous", "s1", "circle"]],
  ["grp_categorical", ["category", "functor", "nattrans"]],
  ["grp_analysis",    ["complexlimit", "convergenceradius", "complexdiff",
                       "holomorphic", "complexseries", "contour", "anacont"]],
  ["grp_zeta",        ["dirichletseries", "zetabasic", "zetacont", "critstrip", "zetazeros", "zeta"]],
  ["grp_reflection",  ["observer", "interhist"]],
  ["grp_roadmap",     ["padic", "adele", "norm", "hilbert", "magma", "semigroup", "topology",
                       "completion", "calculus", "measure", "functionalanalysis",
                       "manifold", "bundle", "homology", "rh", "eq", "func", "limit",
                       "fold", "setlike", "typelike", "mul", "order"]],
];

function renderGlossary() {
  const body = document.getElementById("glossary-body");
  const placed = new Set();
  let html = "";
  for (const [groupKey, keys] of GLOSSARY_GROUPS) {
    const items = keys.filter(k => GLOSSARY[k]);
    if (!items.length) continue;
    items.forEach(k => placed.add(k));
    html += `<div class="glossary-section"><h3>${t(groupKey)}</h3>`;
    for (const k of items) {
      const g = GLOSSARY[k];
      const primary = LANG === "zh" ? g.zh : g.en;
      const other   = LANG === "zh" ? g.en : g.zh;
      html += `
        <div class="glossary-entry">
          <span class="term">${primary.label}</span>
          ${other.label && other.label !== primary.label ? `<span class="term-zh">${other.label}</span>` : ""}
          <div class="desc">${primary.desc}</div>
          ${other.desc && other.desc !== primary.desc ? `<div class="desc-zh">${other.desc}</div>` : ""}
        </div>`;
    }
    html += `</div>`;
  }
  // Anything left over goes under "Other"
  const leftover = Object.keys(GLOSSARY).filter(k => !placed.has(k));
  if (leftover.length) {
    html += `<div class="glossary-section"><h3>${t("grp_other")}</h3>`;
    for (const k of leftover) {
      const g = GLOSSARY[k];
      const primary = LANG === "zh" ? g.zh : g.en;
      const other   = LANG === "zh" ? g.en : g.zh;
      html += `
        <div class="glossary-entry">
          <span class="term">${primary.label}</span>
          ${other.label && other.label !== primary.label ? `<span class="term-zh">${other.label}</span>` : ""}
          <div class="desc">${primary.desc}</div>
          ${other.desc && other.desc !== primary.desc ? `<div class="desc-zh">${other.desc}</div>` : ""}
        </div>`;
    }
    html += `</div>`;
  }
  body.innerHTML = html;
}

function toggleGlossary() {
  const pane = document.getElementById("glossary-pane");
  pane.classList.toggle("open");
  if (pane.classList.contains("open")) renderGlossary();
}

function statusClass(node) {
  // Schema-only takes precedence: an intentional horizon is not a missing target.
  if (node.schema_only) return "schema";
  // Critical path: AI is targeting this region right now.
  if (CRIT_SET.has(node.id)) return "crit";
  // Kernel has no paper markers (defined in lean4/BEDC/FKernel) but is fully proven.
  if (node.id === "kernel") return "proven";
  const checked = node.checked || 0;
  const stmt = node.stmt || 0;
  if (checked > 0 && stmt === 0) return "proven";   // all paper obligations \leanchecked
  if (checked > 0 && stmt > 0)  return "progress";  // some checked, some still \leanstmt
  if (stmt > 0)                  return "scaffold"; // paper exists, no Lean started
  return "scaffold";                                 // no markers, treat as scaffold
}

function nodeColor(cls) {
  return {
    schema:   "#8e44ad",  // purple — intentional horizon
    crit:     "#c0392b",  // red — frontline / AI's current target
    proven:   "#27ae60",  // green — all paper markers \leanchecked
    progress: "#3498db",  // blue — partially proven (checked + stmt mixed)
    scaffold: "#bdc3c7",  // gray — paper-only, Lean pending
  }[cls] || "#bdc3c7";
}

function nodeSizeMetric(node) {
  // Size = total paper obligations (proxy for chapter "weight"), not Lean theorem count.
  // Kernel has no paper markers; anchor it to a representative size.
  if (node.id === "kernel") return 12;
  return (node.checked || 0) + (node.stmt || 0);
}

function nodeLabel(node) {
  const g = GLOSSARY[node.id];
  if (g) return g[LANG].label;
  return node["label_" + LANG] || node.label_en || node.id;
}

function renderCy() {
  const nodes = DEPS.nodes.map(n => {
    const cls = statusClass(n);
    return {
      data: {
        id: n.id, label: nodeLabel(n),
        thms: n.thms || 0, score: n.score || 0,
        downstream: n.downstream || 0, cls,
        color: nodeColor(cls),
        size: nodeSizeMetric(n),
        checked: n.checked || 0, stmt: n.stmt || 0,
        schema_only: !!n.schema_only,
      },
    };
  });
  const edges = DEPS.edges.map((e, i) => ({
    data: { id: "e" + i, source: e.source, target: e.target }
  }));

  CY = cytoscape({
    container: document.getElementById("cy"),
    elements: [...nodes, ...edges],
    style: [
      {
        selector: "node",
        style: {
          "background-color": "data(color)",
          "label": "data(label)",
          "font-size": "30px",
          "font-weight": 700,
          "color": "#0f0f0f",
          "text-valign": "bottom",
          "text-halign": "center",
          "text-margin-y": 13,
          "text-outline-color": "#fbfbfa",
          "text-outline-width": 6,
          "text-background-color": "#fbfbfa",
          "text-background-opacity": 0.92,
          "text-background-padding": "5px",
          "text-background-shape": "roundrectangle",
          "width": "mapData(size, 0, 30, 24, 60)",
          "height": "mapData(size, 0, 30, 24, 60)",
          "border-width": 2,
          "border-color": "#fff",
          "overlay-padding": 4,
        },
      },
      { selector: "node[cls = 'crit']", style: { "border-width": 3, "border-color": "#7e1810" } },
      {
        selector: "node:selected",
        style: {
          "border-width": 8,
          "border-color": "#f39c12",
          "border-opacity": 1,
          "overlay-color": "#f39c12",
          "overlay-opacity": 0.18,
          "overlay-padding": 12,
          "z-index": 999,
        }
      },
      {
        selector: "edge",
        style: {
          "width": 1.5, "line-color": "#7a8a99",
          "target-arrow-color": "#7a8a99", "target-arrow-shape": "triangle",
          "curve-style": "bezier", "arrow-scale": 0.95,
          "opacity": 0.55,
        },
      },
      { selector: "edge.highlight", style: { "line-color": "#c0392b", "target-arrow-color": "#c0392b", "width": 3, "opacity": 1 } },
      { selector: "edge.faded", style: { "opacity": 0.06 } },
      { selector: "node.faded", style: { "opacity": 0.15 } },
    ],
    layout: {
      name: "dagre",
      rankDir: "LR",
      // Wider rank spacing + tighter node spacing -> bigger labels under fit:true.
      // The geometry is tuned so that the graph's natural size matches a typical
      // viewport at fit ratio close to 1.0.
      nodeSep: 36,
      rankSep: 96,
      edgeSep: 14,
      ranker: "network-simplex",
      padding: 16,
      fit: true,
      animate: false,
    },
    // Disable wheel/pinch zoom (per request); pan-drag remains for nudging
    // so the dropdown's centered jump can be fine-tuned without the user
    // ever needing to scroll-zoom.
    userZoomingEnabled: false,
    userPanningEnabled: true,
    boxSelectionEnabled: false,
    wheelSensitivity: 0,
    autoungrabify: true,
  });

  CY.on("tap", "node", evt => showNodeDetail(evt.target.id()));
  CY.on("tap", evt => {
    if (evt.target === CY) {
      document.getElementById("detail-content").innerHTML =
        `<div class="hint">${t("hint")}</div>`;
      CY.elements().removeClass("highlight");
      CY.nodes().unselect();
    }
  });
  // Global view: fit all nodes in the viewport. With the bigger font and
  // outline below, labels stay legible even when fit-zoomed. The dropdown
  // is the primary nav for jumping between specific regions.
  CY.fit(undefined, 16);
}

function showNodeDetail(id) {
  const node = DEPS.nodes.find(n => n.id === id);
  const g = GLOSSARY[id];
  if (!node) return;

  CY.elements().removeClass("highlight").removeClass("faded");
  CY.nodes().unselect();
  const cyNode = CY.getElementById(id);
  cyNode.select();

  // Find the full upstream subtree (all ancestors) and downstream subtree (all descendants)
  const upstream = new Set([id]);
  const downstream = new Set([id]);
  const queueUp = [id];
  while (queueUp.length) {
    const cur = queueUp.shift();
    DEPS.edges.forEach(e => {
      if (e.target === cur && !upstream.has(e.source)) {
        upstream.add(e.source);
        queueUp.push(e.source);
      }
    });
  }
  const queueDown = [id];
  while (queueDown.length) {
    const cur = queueDown.shift();
    DEPS.edges.forEach(e => {
      if (e.source === cur && !downstream.has(e.target)) {
        downstream.add(e.target);
        queueDown.push(e.target);
      }
    });
  }
  const keep = new Set([...upstream, ...downstream]);

  CY.nodes().forEach(n => { if (!keep.has(n.id())) n.addClass("faded"); });
  CY.edges().forEach(e => {
    const s = e.data("source"), t = e.data("target");
    if (keep.has(s) && keep.has(t)) e.addClass("highlight");
    else e.addClass("faded");
  });

  const incoming = DEPS.edges
    .filter(e => e.target === id)
    .map(e => e.source)
    .filter(s => DEPS.nodes.find(n => n.id === s));

  const otherLang = LANG === "en" ? "zh" : "en";

  let html = "";
  if (g) {
    html += `<div class="term-name">${g[LANG].label}<span class="term-other">${g[otherLang].label}</span></div>`;
    html += `<div class="term-desc">${g[LANG].desc}</div>`;
    html += `<div class="term-other-desc">${g[otherLang].desc}</div>`;
  } else {
    html += `<div class="term-name">${id}</div>`;
    html += `<div class="term-desc" style="color:#888;">(no glossary entry)</div>`;
  }

  const stats = [];
  if (node.checked) stats.push(`<span style="background:#e9f7ef;color:#1e7c43;"><strong>${node.checked}</strong> ${t("detail_checked")}</span>`);
  if (node.stmt) stats.push(`<span style="background:#eaf3fb;color:#1f5d8a;"><strong>${node.stmt}</strong> ${t("detail_stmt")}</span>`);
  if (typeof node.thms === "number" && node.thms > 0) stats.push(`<span><strong>${node.thms}</strong> ${t("detail_thms")}</span>`);
  if (node.downstream) stats.push(`<span><strong>${node.downstream}</strong> ${t("detail_downstream")}</span>`);
  if (node.score) stats.push(`<span><strong>${node.score.toFixed(2)}</strong> ${t("detail_score")}</span>`);
  if (node.schema_only) stats.push(`<span style="background:#f4ecf7;color:#7d3c98;">${t("legend_schema")}</span>`);
  else if (CRIT_SET.has(id)) stats.push(`<span style="background:#fef5f3;color:#c0392b;">${t("legend_crit")}</span>`);
  if (stats.length) html += `<div class="term-stats">${stats.join(" ")}</div>`;

  if (incoming.length) {
    const links = incoming.map(s => {
      const sg = GLOSSARY[s];
      const lbl = sg ? sg[LANG].label : s;
      return `<a onclick="showNodeDetail('${s}')">${lbl}</a>`;
    });
    html += `<div class="term-deps">${t("detail_deps")} ${links.join(" ")}</div>`;
  }

  document.getElementById("detail-content").innerHTML = html;
}

function renderCritList() {
  const cp = (STATUS.critical_path || []).slice(0, 7);
  const el = document.getElementById("crit-list");
  el.innerHTML = cp.map(c => {
    const g = GLOSSARY[c.name];
    const lbl = g ? g[LANG].label : c.name;
    return `<a onclick="showNodeDetail('${c.name}')">${lbl}<span class="crit-meta">· ${c.thms} thm · score ${c.score.toFixed(2)}</span></a>`;
  }).join("");
}

function renderSpark() {
  const months = STATUS.monthly_activity || [];
  if (!months.length) return;
  const svg = document.getElementById("spark");
  const w = svg.clientWidth || 600, h = 28;
  const max = Math.max(...months.map(m => m.commits));
  const stepX = w / Math.max(months.length - 1, 1);
  const points = months.map((m, i) => `${(i * stepX).toFixed(1)},${(h - (m.commits / max) * (h - 4) - 1).toFixed(1)}`).join(" ");
  svg.innerHTML = `
    <polyline fill="none" stroke="#2c3e50" stroke-width="1.4" points="${points}"/>
    ${months.map((m, i) => `<circle cx="${(i * stepX).toFixed(1)}" cy="${(h - (m.commits / max) * (h - 4) - 1).toFixed(1)}" r="1.3" fill="#2c3e50"/>`).join("")}
  `;
  const first = months[0]?.month || "";
  const last = months[months.length - 1]?.month || "";
  const total = months.reduce((s, m) => s + m.commits, 0);
  document.getElementById("footer-range").textContent = `${first} – ${last} · ${total} total`;
}

function renderAll() {
  applyStaticI18n();
  if (!CY) renderCy();
  else {
    CY.nodes().forEach(n => {
      const node = DEPS.nodes.find(d => d.id === n.id());
      if (node) n.data("label", nodeLabel(node));
    });
  }
  renderCritList();
  renderSpark();
  if (CY && CY.nodes(":selected").length) {
    showNodeDetail(CY.nodes(":selected")[0].id());
  } else {
    document.getElementById("detail-content").innerHTML = `<div class="hint">${t("hint")}</div>`;
  }
}

function setLang(lang) {
  LANG = lang;
  renderAll();
  // refresh glossary if open
  const pane = document.getElementById("glossary-pane");
  if (pane && pane.classList.contains("open")) renderGlossary();
}

(async () => {
  try {
    await loadData();
    renderAll();
    window.addEventListener("resize", renderSpark);
  } catch (e) {
    document.getElementById("cy").innerHTML =
      `<div style="padding:2rem;color:red;">Error loading data: ${e.message}</div>`;
  }
})();
</script>
```
